ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when product record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when product record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the interaction type */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type (e.g., purchase, inquiry, browse) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the product involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the type of interaction */,
  "B0" INTEGER /* Count of interactions related to product category B0 */,
  "B1" INTEGER /* Count of interactions related to product category B1 */,
  "B2" INTEGER /* Count of interactions related to product category B2 */,
  "B3" INTEGER /* Count of interactions related to product category B3 */,
  "B4" INTEGER /* Count of interactions related to product category B4 */,
  "B5" INTEGER /* Count of interactions related to product category B5 */,
  "B6" INTEGER /* Count of interactions related to product category B6 */,
  "B7" INTEGER /* Count of interactions related to product category B7 */,
  "B8" INTEGER /* Count of interactions related to product category B8 */,
  "B9" INTEGER /* Count of interactions related to product category B9 */,
  "label" INTEGER /* Label indicating the nature of the engagement (1 for positive, 0 for negative) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when interaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when interaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("interaction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, marketer, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget for the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when campaign record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when campaign record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_interactions" (
  "campaign_interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the campaign interaction */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the campaign */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when campaign interaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when campaign interaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_interactions_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_interactions_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)
